name: Authentic English Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a soft, rich custard by beating 4 egg yolks until light and pale yellow.
2. Heat 2 cups light cream with 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon orange flower water or vanilla in a bowl. Add the beaten egg yolks while beating very hard.
3. Cook without boiling, stirring continuously until the custard coats the spoon. Remove to a bowl and cover. Refrigerate until well chilled.
4. Cut two-layer sponge cake (baked or purchased) into finger-length pieces.
5. Spread each piece with raspberry jam and quickly dip in 1/2 cup sherry.
6. Place half of these sponge fingers in the bottom of a deep cut-glass bowl.
7. Cover with half the custard.
8. Whip the remaining cream, sweetening with 1/2 cup icing sugar and vanilla to taste. Cover the custard with half the whipped cream.
9. Make a second layer on top of all this.
10. Top with toasted almonds, standing upright in the cream, and add angelica slivers or small roses instead of almonds and angelica.
11. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours. This beautiful dessert never fails to create a sensation and is easy to prepare.
